generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance HokuyoUST110LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-110LX LiDAR mounted on the 1/10‑scale autonomous vehicle for 2D range scanning"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARRawPointCloudTransmitted
]

instance IntelRealSenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel RealSense D435i depth camera providing RGB‑D frames for environment perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraFramesTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "On‑board speed sensor measuring ego‑vehicle longitudinal speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering‑angle sensor reporting the current wheel steering position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction (Data Transmitted)
instance LiDARRawPointCloudTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST110LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraFramesTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelRealSenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

// C10: Data
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed point‑cloud data derived from raw LiDAR scans"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARRawPointCloudTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANClusteringEnabler, KalmanTrackerEnabler
]

instance DepthImageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth image frames extracted from RealSense camera input"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraFramesTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Visualization3DEnabler, KalmanTrackerEnabler
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Timestamped vehicle longitudinal speed values"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControllerEnabler
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Timestamped steering‑angle measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControllerEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers (functional entities and tooling)
instance DBSCANClusteringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "DBSCAN point‑cloud clustering algorithm used to segment objects"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance KalmanTrackerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Kalman‑filter based multi‑object tracker for maintaining object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ACCControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control controller complying with ISO 15622"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance Visualization3DEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3‑D visualization model rendering vehicle state and predicted trajectories"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Translation functional entity that serializes, unit‑converts and forwards ROS2 messages"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance SQLStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database engine storing time‑series vehicle states and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance JetPackSDKEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA JetPack 5.0 SDK providing GPU drivers and AI libraries"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ROS2MiddlewareEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS 2 middleware handling inter‑process communication over Wi‑Fi"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Python38RuntimeEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 runtime executing perception and control scripts"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance CppCompilerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ compiler for high‑performance modules (e.g., controller loop)"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance MatlabSimulinkClusteringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink environment used for developing and tuning clustering/tracking algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance OPCUATranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "OPC‑UA bridge optionally used for industrial‑grade data translation"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance WiFiNetworkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Wi‑Fi networking layer transmitting real‑time sensor streams between PT and DT"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "UI service visualizing real‑time vehicle state, object tracks and generating visual reports"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualReportObjectTracksInsight, SystemHealthIndicatorInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service off‑loading perception and ACC computations to the digital twin and returning speed commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides ComputedFollowingSpeedInsight, AdjustDesiredSpeedAction, SetTargetSpeedAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Operator interface for enabling/disabling ACC, modifying desired speed and issuing emergency brake"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, EmergencyBrakeAction
]

// C17: Insights
instance ComputedFollowingSpeedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Actionable insight: computed following speed for the ego vehicle based on perception"
]

instance VisualReportObjectTracksInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual report of detected and tracked objects displayed in the UI"
]

instance SystemHealthIndicatorInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "System health indicators (e.g., sensor status, CPU load) presented to the operator"
]

// C17: Actions
instance AdjustDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator‑initiated adjustment of the desired cruising speed"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetTargetSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic setting of target speed command sent to the vehicle actuator"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command to enable Adaptive Cruise Control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command to disable Adaptive Cruise Control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakeAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Emergency brake command overriding all other speed commands"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT sends control commands back to the PT via the Actuation functional entity over Wi‑Fi/ROS 2, including desired speed values, ACC enable/disable flags, emergency‑brake signals, and steering adjustments."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates in real time with a maximum end‑to‑end network latency of 100 ms (per 3GPP TS 22.185) and requires clock synchronization across components to within 100 ms accuracy."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation orchestrates the Physical Twin Entity (sensing, actuation), Digital Twin Entity (data collection, ACC, reporting, visualization preprocessing), User Entity (3‑D visualization and control panel UI), and Cross‑System Entity (data translation); intra‑entity communication uses ROS 2, inter‑entity communication uses Wi‑Fi."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT is employed during the design/development stage for cyber‑physical experimentation and also during the operational stage for real‑time monitoring, control, and maintenance of the autonomous vehicle."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "High‑fidelity representation is achieved by running the ACC algorithm on the DT and using real sensor data; model validity is supported by adherence to ISO 15622, real‑time latency ≤ 100 ms, and clock sync ≤ 100 ms to ensure temporal fidelity for safety‑critical control."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Physical‑to‑virtual data are exchanged over a Wi‑Fi link (IEEE 802.11) using ROS 2 topics; data are serialized by the Data Translation FE; latency is bounded to 100 ms as per 3GPP TS 22.185; ROS 2 provides DDS‑based publish/subscribe communication."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Each functional entity is packaged as a ROS 2 node and deployed on dedicated hardware: the Physical Twin Entity runs on the vehicle’s Jetson Orin Nano, the Digital Twin Entity runs on an external workstation or cloud server, and the User Entity runs on a user workstation; entities communicate over Wi‑Fi."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The architecture follows ISO 23247 Part 2 reference architecture, uses ISO 15622 for ACC functionality, references ISO/IEC 30173:2023 for DT terminology, and aligns communication latency requirements with 3GPP TS 22.185; OPC UA (IEC 62541) is mentioned as a possible implementation option."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety considerations include strict real‑time latency (≤ 100 ms), clock synchronization (≤ 100 ms), and adherence to ISO 15622 for ACC behavior; explicit cybersecurity mechanisms are not described in the document."
]
